message:
fix(freeze): pass closure context in self-recursive calls

Frozen functions with closures have a 7-parameter signature including
var_refs, closure_var_count, and cpool. Self-recursive calls were only
passing 4 parameters, causing compilation errors in libraries like rxjs.

Now passes through the closure context for self-calls, fixing:
- rxjs test_rxjs_minimal.js: PASS (both function and object forms)
